title: Trims to Tokens
description: Changes all armor trims into collectible tokens
body:
# Trims to Tokens transforms all armor trim patterns into collectible tokens 

giving your Minecraft world a fresh aesthetic twist.

✨ Features:

Converts every armor trim pattern into unique token designs
Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.9, 1.21.10, and 1.21.11
Seamless integration with vanilla gameplay
No performance impact

🎮 Perfect for:

Players who want a different visual style for their armor customization
Builders and collectors looking for unique trim appearances
Anyone seeking a fresh take on the armor trim system

📦 Installation:

Simply drop the resource pack into your resourcepacks folder and activate it in-game. No additional mods or dependencies required!
